entity.description: Clean is really clean when you choose sustainable ingredients. Your laundry is done without synthetic perfumes, dyes and microplastics. For example, Seepje uses the skin of the Sapindus fruit from the Himalayas, which contains a natural soap! Better for the environment and everyone involved.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: This 99.8% natural colour laundry detergent from Soaply effectively cleans your laundry and makes colours last longer. We fight pilling and lint so you can shine like a rainbow! 99.8% ingredients of natural origin Makes colours shine, even clean at 20C Bottle is made of Dutch recycled plastic (97%) and is recyclable Certified by Ecocert and Vegan Society
